history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible up ahead and to the right. I am facing upward, and the cell directly in front of me is an empty floor, so moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is now two cells to my right and one cell ahead, but I am still facing upward. The cell directly ahead is empty floor, so moving forward is safe and may open a better path toward the goal while avoiding the lava on my right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly to my right with a safe floor cell between us, while forward is blocked by a wall. I should turn right to face the open path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right. The cell directly ahead is safe floor, while the goal is up-left from my current position. Since I cannot move diagonally and there is lava blocking the middle column above, the best immediate safe move is to advance along the open corridor to the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly ahead in the corridor, but the cell immediately in front of me is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The only safe adjacent option visible is the open cell to my right, so I should turn right to face it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is immediately to my left. Since I am facing downward after the previous turn, moving forward would not reach it. I should turn right to face the goal cell, which will put it directly ahead for the next move.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is no longer visible, but the cell directly ahead is lava, so I must not move forward. The open corridor extends to my left side, so I should turn left to face a safe floor cell and continue exploring toward where the goal was seen.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is immediately to my left. Turning is better than moving forward because the cell ahead is not the goal, while aligning with the goal lets me reach it next. I will turn right to face the goal cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safe path is to the left through open floor cells, so I should turn left to face that corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly to my left, one adjacent cell away. To move onto it safely, I should first turn to face left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open path is on my left side through safe floor cells, so I should turn left to face that route.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is immediately to my left, while the cell ahead is safe floor. Since I need to face the goal before moving onto it, I should turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly in front of me at row 06 column D, and it is safe to enter. I should move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
